headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Vs The Rest Of The Industrial Packaging Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the industrial packaging stocks, including International Paper (NYSE:IP) and its peers.
